creator: ard_1@mail.ru
text:
(In reply to Kubilay Kocak from comment #2)

Yes, and 1.6.2 is very unstable in our environment - it can crash several times per day with signal 10 under moderate load.
The fixes for that issue were included in 1.6.3 release.

So I guess that we should also consider merging 1.6.5 in a quarterly branch.
